textDisplay:
Girl boss stories are great if well made and the people behind this have a good track record… anyways below is a short non exhaustive list to jog your memory instead of getting caught up in the YouTube rage bait “anti feminist reviewer” echo chamber..

Kill Bill Series
Terminator series 
Alien 1 & 2
Ghost in the Shell
Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
The Hunger Games
Atomic Blonde
Underworld
Aeon Flux
Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
Everything Everywhere All at Once
The Edge of Tomorrow
